title: Senior Financial Analyst - IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies family as a Senior Financial Analyst in Bhubaneswar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies:
IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies!
